creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text: I don't think kde@ can do much -- if we go down that route, it means checking if each port for new commands or behavior changes that rely on a certain version and requiring that. What upstream should do is either bump their minimum version requirement or at least do what they did here: https://github.com/uclouvain/openjpeg/commit/c5dd6035c942ab5969b7dc3a873e95e3b542f544
